title: Canal companies; right of way through state lands
doc_html:
§346.  Canal companies; right of way through state lands

Any domestic corporation established for the purpose of cutting canals in this state shall have the right of way through any land belonging to the state for the canal and the use of the banks thereof to deposit the dirt excavated therefrom.
doc_text:
§346.  Canal companies; right of way through state lands
Any domestic corporation established for the purpose of cutting canals in this state shall have the right of way through any land belonging to the state for the canal and the use of the banks thereof to deposit the dirt excavated therefrom.
